_comment: Example CCS embedding for a game soundtrack aggregate (Streets of Rage 2 / Bare Knuckle II, Yuzo Koshiro + Motohiro Kawashima). Aggregated across all 22 tracks. Represents the structural signature of the soundtrack as a whole, not a single track. Values are weighted means; weights reflect track duration.

source_features: driver: Bare Knuckle / Streets of Rage custom Z80 sequencer
hardware: YM2612 FM + SN76489 PSG + DAC channel
harmonic_vocabulary: jazz-influenced chord extensions, non-diatonic progressions
rhythmic_grid: 4/4 primary with polyrhythmic percussion layers
chromatic_deviation_rate: high (passing tones, blue notes, tritone substitution)
structural_form_examples: through-composed with recurring A-section, motivic development
evidence.notes: This is a soundtrack-level aggregate, not a single track. Values are duration-weighted means across all 22 tracks. generative_constraint is intentionally low: Koshiro's harmonic language is jazz-chromatic and does not conform to diatonic scale adherence. recurrence_depth is high (3/4): motif, phrase, and section recurrence all confirmed across the catalog; form-level return is partial. basin_permeability is moderate — the sequencer supports smoother section transitions than GEMS/SMPS, and Koshiro exploits this with bridging material between A and B sections.
